panels.description: Live request volume written into processed_logs for the currently selected dashboard time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS requests FROM processed_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Requests per Minute

panels.description: Latest system-wide forecast for the next bucket. With the default config, the stream processor uses the last 10 one-minute buckets to estimate request volume for the next minute.

targets.rawSql: SELECT predicted_request_count FROM load_forecasts WHERE scope = 'system' AND $__timeFilter(predicted_bucket_end) ORDER BY predicted_bucket_end DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Next Minute Forecast

panels.description: Highest bot-risk entities within the selected time range, deduplicated by ip and user agent.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(ip, ' / ', user_agent) AS entity, max(bot_score) AS bot_score, max(number_of_requests) AS number_of_requests, max(max_barrage) AS max_barrage FROM bot_feature_windows WHERE is_bot = 1 AND $__timeFilter(window_end) GROUP BY entity ORDER BY bot_score DESC, number_of_requests DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Bot Entities

panels.description: Endpoints with the strongest anomaly signals in the selected time range, grouped by endpoint instead of repeated raw rows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT endpoint, max(anomaly_score) AS anomaly_score, argMax(avg_latency_ms, window_end) AS avg_latency_ms, argMax(p99_latency_ms, window_end) AS p99_latency_ms, argMax(status_5xx_ratio, window_end) AS status_5xx_ratio FROM anomaly_alerts WHERE is_anomaly = 1 AND $__timeFilter(window_end) GROUP BY endpoint ORDER BY anomaly_score DESC, endpoint ASC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Endpoint Anomaly Alerts
